name: before-you-go-wordpress-plugin
description: Editorial tool to show offers or recirculation prompts as a reader exits the site.
author: Human Made

scripts.lint: npm run eslint; npm run phpcs
scripts.bump:patch: bump patch --commit 'Prepare v%s release' package.json README.md plugin.php
scripts.bump:minor: bump minor --commit 'Prepare v%s release' package.json README.md plugin.php
scripts.bump:major: bump major --commit 'Prepare v%s release' package.json README.md plugin.php
